license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rqzd5x6
title: Larval development
author: Wen Aw

steps_raw.instruction: Flies from each of the 4 mitotypes were placed in individual egg collection containers.
Eggs were collected manually and added to either the 1:2 or 1:16 P:C diet with ~200 eggs per bottle with 6 bottles/mitotype/diet.

Microbiome was added after 48 hours and flies that eclosed in a 3d window were collected, counted and % eclosion was determined by dividing the number of eclosed flies from each mitotype by the sum of both mitotypes.
